name: python3-numpydoc
title: python3-numpydoc
summary: Sphinx extension to support docstrings in Numpy format -- Python3
description:
Sphinx extension to support docstrings in Numpy format -- Python3
This package defines several extensions for the Sphinx documentation
system, shipped in the numpydoc Python package. In particular, these provide
support for the Numpy docstring format in Sphinx.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use numpydoc because Sphinx extension to support docstrings in Numpy format -- Python3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use numpydoc as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `numpydoc [options] [args]` as documented upstream for numpydoc.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair numpydoc with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `numpydoc --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
